case_title: SURYA 647 LLC VS. YE YUAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SURYA 647 LLC SERVED AUG-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, YE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SURYA 647 LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUAN, YE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 647 CLAY STREET, #3 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94111 SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SURYA 647 LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, YE
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SURYA 647 LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, YE

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, YE
